scripts.check: pnpm run build && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint:only && pnpm run typecheck:only && pnpm run test:only
scripts.clean: git clean -xdf node_modules/.cache && pnpm -r exec git clean -xdf dist
scripts.fix: pnpm run format && pnpm run lint:fix
scripts.lint: pnpm run build && pnpm run lint:only
scripts.nuke: pnpm run clean && git clean -xdf node_modules
scripts.test: pnpm run build && pnpm run test:only
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run build && pnpm run typecheck:only
